title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 19 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 19 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 19 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 19/06/2024
DCE iron ore futures continued to ﬂuctuate in a day，Significant drop at the end. the main contract closed 824，an decrease of 0.36%throughout the day; some traders were negative to sell；Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchased on demand. today's overall market transaction atmosphere in general .
